description: Add CI validation and drift detection for the Copier template, and update ARCHITECTURE.md and CONTRIBUTING.md to document the new Copier-based workflow.

userStories.title: Add template validation CI job
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CI to validate the Copier template itself so that template regressions are caught before affecting downstream services. Add a CI job with a matrix of all toggle combinations (use_database x use_gunicorn), running copier copy with --defaults, py_compile on generated files, and docker build on the Dockerfile.
acceptanceCriteria: CI workflow includes a template-validate job
Job uses matrix strategy for use_database: [true, false] and use_gunicorn: [true, false]
Job runs copier copy with --trust --vcs-ref HEAD --defaults into temp directory
Job runs python -m py_compile on all generated Python files
Job includes docker build step on the generated Dockerfile

userStories.title: Add template drift detection CI check
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CI to warn when generated services are behind the template so that drift is visible. Create scripts/check-template-drift.sh that runs copier update --pretend on each service with a .copier-answers.yml file, and add a CI job that runs it.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/check-template-drift.sh exists and is executable
Script iterates over monorepo/services/*/ directories with .copier-answers.yml
Script runs copier update --trust --vcs-ref HEAD --pretend --skip-answered on each
Script outputs warnings for services with template drift
CI workflow includes a template-drift job that runs the script

userStories.title: Update ARCHITECTURE.md
userStories.description: As a developer, I want ARCHITECTURE.md to document the Copier-based pattern inheritance approach. Replace the Pattern Inheritance section with Copier documentation as specified in the design doc. Remove references to the layered fork model. Add note about scope (FastAPI HTTP services only).
acceptanceCriteria: ARCHITECTURE.md Pattern Inheritance section documents Copier workflow
References to layered fork model are removed
Section documents scripts/new-service.sh as entry point
Section documents copier update --trust --vcs-ref HEAD for updates
Section notes scope is FastAPI HTTP services only

userStories.title: Update CONTRIBUTING.md
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CONTRIBUTING.md to document the Copier-based workflow for creating new services. Replace the Creating a new service section with Copier instructions: add Copier to prerequisites, document scripts/new-service.sh, list template questions and defaults, add copier update section with conflict resolution expectations.
acceptanceCriteria: CONTRIBUTING.md Creating a new service section uses Copier workflow
Copier is listed in prerequisites (pip install copier or brew install copier)
scripts/new-service.sh documented as entry point
Template questions and defaults are listed
copier update workflow and conflict resolution expectations documented
userStories.notes: Last task in workstream — natural review checkpoint for documentation accuracy.
